papers.title: First documented instance of cannibalism in the Critically Endangered Madagascar Fish Eagle Icthyophaga vociferoides
papers.authors: Razafimanjato, Gilbert; Thorstrom, Russell; Rakotondramanga, Jean M; Benjara, Armand; Razakaratrimo, Stéphanie V
papers.summary_cn: 首次记录到极度濒危的马达加斯加鱼鹰（Icthyophaga vociferoides）的同类相食行为。该发现基于野外观察，揭示了该物种在资源匮乏或种群压力下的生存策略，为濒危猛禽的生态适应研究提供了新证据。

papers.title: Cleaning mutualisms: potential effects on fish community structure and herbivory rates
papers.authors: Cryan, Daniel M.; Osenberg, Craig W.
papers.abstract: Abstract Herbivores play key roles on reefs by consuming algae that compete with corals. Cleaning mutualisms can alter the distribution and feeding behavior of herbivorous fishes and may indirectly affect benthic communities. These dynamics were examined on patch reefs with and naturally without the bluestreak cleaner wrasse, Labroides dimidiatus , in July 2021 in Moorea, French Polynesia (17°28’35.52"S, 149°48’58.35"W) using herbivory assays, fish and benthic community surveys, and behavioral observations of cleaners and the client Ctenochaetus striatus . Herbivory rates on two macroalgae ( Asparagopsis and Sargassum ) were similar between reefs with cleaners present versus absent. Benthic communities were also similar, although turf algae associated with Stegastes damselfish was more abundant on reefs with cleaners. Smaller reefs with cleaners had greater fish abundances than smaller reefs lacking cleaners, though fish community trophic composition was similar between the two reef types. Bite rates for Ctenochaetus striatus were unaffected by cleaner presence, suggesting no foraging tradeoffs associated with cleaning. Rates of different cleaner behaviors (cleaning, cheating, chasing) varied among client trophic groups, with most interactions involving herbivores/detritivores. Moreover, the relative positiveness of cleaner behaviors (i.e., ratio of cleaning to cheating and chasing) was correlated with the difference in the densities of client species between reefs with cleaners present versus absent: i.e., clients with more positive cleaning interactions were more abundant on reefs with cleaners. These results suggest that cleaners did not affect herbivory, and that the hypothesized indirect effects were weak, because cleaner-client interactions were dominated by negative cleaner behaviors, which impeded strong responses of clients.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究探讨清洁共生对鱼类群落结构和植食速率的影响。2021年7月在法属波利尼西亚莫雷阿岛，通过植食性实验、鱼类与底栖群落调查及行为观察，对比了有/无蓝纹裂唇鱼（Labroides dimidiatus）的礁区。结果显示，两种大型藻类的植食速率在两类礁区相似，底栖群落也无显著差异，但清洁礁区中与雀鲷（Stegastes）相关的丝状藻更丰富。清洁鱼的存在未改变客户鱼Ctenochaetus striatus的咬食速率，且清洁行为中负面行为（欺骗、追逐）占主导，导致间接效应较弱。

papers.title: From waste to resource: nutrient recovery from aquaculture sedimented sludge for sustainable Arthrospira platensis cultivation in circular aquaculture systems
papers.authors: Elshobary, Mostafa E.; Gerdes genannt Janßen, Luca; Schwenkler, Tamara; Noke, Anja; Ende, Stephan S. W.
papers.abstract: Introduction The sustainable recovery and reuse of nutrients from aquaculture waste represent a promising approach to reducing the environmental impact of fish farming while supporting cost-effective microalgal cultivation. Materials and methods This study investigated the potential of aquaculture sedimented sludge as a nutrient source for cultivating Arthrospira platensis. Chemical and thermochemical treatments were applied to enhance the solubilization of essential nutrients, particularly phosphorus. Results and discussion Among the tested reagents, 1 M HCl and 2 M NaOH resulted in the highest phosphate release, with increasing sludge dosage up to 20 g L -1 further improving solubilization efficiency. Thermochemical treatments combining ultrasound or autoclaving with chemical conditioning significantly enhanced nutrient recovery, with the acid–autoclave (AUA) and autoclaved water (AUW) treatments achieving the highest phosphate concentrations (270.6 and 210.8 mg L -1 , respectively). Recovered nutrient extracts were subsequently tested as culture media for A. platensis, with six treatments evaluated (acidic, alkaline, and water-based extracts with ultrasound and autoclaving) compared to a standard synthetic medium (Spirulina SAG). The AUW extract supported robust biomass accumulation, comparable to that in SAG medium, when supplemented with 2 g L -1 KNO 3 and 10 g L -1 NaHCO 3 . Further optimization of nitrogen supplementation (0–2 g L -1 KNO 3 ) identified 1 g L -1 KNO 3 as optimal, yielding a biomass of 1.45 g L 1 and a protein content of 559.3 ± 21.6 mg L -1 . Phycobiliprotein yields (C-phycocyanin: 25.12 mg g -1 ; allophycocyanin: 6.25 mg g -1 ) were comparable to those in synthetic medium. Nutrient analysis revealed substantial reductions in 1 g L -1 KNO 3 medium: PO 4 3- (90.90%), NH4+ (99.2%), NO 3 - (68.2%), and K + (79.7%) during cultivation, indicating efficient nutrient assimilation by A. platensis. This study demonstrates a novel, sustainable approach to transforming aquaculture sedimented sludge into an effective culture medium for A. platensis, thereby reducing reliance on synthetic nutrients and advancing circular bioresource utilization in aquaculture systems.
papers.summary_cn: 研究利用水产养殖沉积污泥作为营养源培养螺旋藻（Arthrospira platensis），通过化学和热化学处理优化磷等营养释放。酸-高压釜（AUA）和高压水（AUW）处理获得最高磷酸盐浓度（270.6和210.8 mg L⁻¹）。AUW提取液补充1 g L⁻¹ KNO₃后，生物量达1.45 g L⁻¹，蛋白含量559.3 mg L⁻¹，藻胆蛋白产量与合成培养基相当。该方法实现了废弃物资源化，减少合成营养依赖，推动循环水产养殖系统发展。

papers.title: Editorial: Harnessing aquatic microbial symbioses for sustainable aquaculture: unveiling biodiversity and ecosystem dynamics
papers.authors: Saraiva, Marcia; Gerilovych, Anton; Ay, Hilal
papers.summary_cn: 探讨利用水生微生物共生关系促进可持续水产养殖，旨在揭示其生物多样性与生态系统动态。该社论聚焦微生物群落对养殖系统健康与生产力的调控机制。

papers.title: Tilapia Feeding Behavior Image Dataset: A Benchmark Resource for Automated Feeding Intensity Recognition in Aquaculture
papers.authors: Hassan, Shahbaz Gul; Hang, Yin; Hasan, Murtaza; Sohel, Ferdous
papers.summary_cn: 该研究构建了罗非鱼摄食行为图像数据集，旨在为水产养殖中自动识别摄食强度提供基准资源。数据集可作为评估和开发计算机视觉算法的重要参考，支持精准投喂管理。

papers.title: Governability Challenges in Indonesian Aquaculture: A Political-Legal Analysis Hanzel
papers.authors: Mamuaya, Hanzel; Kalesaran, Ockstan; Lumenta, Cyska
papers.abstract: Aquaculture has become one of the fastest-growing food production sectors globally and is increasingly recognized as a strategic component of food security, economic development, and Blue Economy policies. In Indonesia, rapid aquaculture expansion has generated significant opportunities for production growth, employment, and export development. However, it has also intensified ecological pressures, institutional complexity, stakeholder conflicts, and governance challenges. This study aims to synthesize existing knowledge on Indonesian aquaculture governance and develop a conceptual framework for strengthening aquaculture governability. A Systematic Literature Review (SLR) was conducted following the PRISMA 2020 guidelines. Literature was collected from Scopus, Web of Science, ScienceDirect, Dimensions, SpringerLink, and Garuda databases, resulting in 68 studies published between 2015 and 2026 that met the inclusion criteria. The findings were analyzed using thematic synthesis and interpreted through the lens of Interactive Governance theory. The review identified five interrelated dimensions shaping aquaculture governability: economic growth orientation, ecological sustainability, institutional coordination, state–market–community interaction, and enforcement and knowledge systems. The results indicate that governance remains predominantly growth-oriented, while ecological resilience, social inclusion, regulatory coherence, and adaptive governance capacities often receive insufficient attention. Based on the synthesis, this study proposes a conceptual framework of Indonesian aquaculture governability that integrates economic, ecological, institutional, social, and informational dimensions. The framework contributes to governance scholarship by providing an analytical foundation for understanding and improving adaptive, participatory, and sustainable aquaculture governance in complex social-ecological systems. Keywords: Aquaculture Governance, Blue Economy, Governability, Interactive Governance
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过系统文献综述（PRISMA 2020指南），分析了2015-2026年间68篇文献，旨在构建印尼水产养殖治理能力的概念框架。基于互动治理理论，识别出经济增长导向、生态可持续性、制度协调、国家-市场-社区互动及执法与知识系统五个关键维度。结果表明当前治理以增长为主导，对生态韧性、社会包容和适应性治理关注不足。该框架整合经济、生态、制度、社会与信息维度，为理解复杂社会-生态系统中水产养殖的适应性、参与式及可持续治理提供分析基础。

papers.title: Nutritional detoxification strategies in aquaculture: bioactive feed additives mitigating oxidative stress and xenobiotic toxicity in fish
papers.authors: Öz, Mustafa; Üstüner, Enes
papers.abstract: Abstract The rapid expansion of global aquaculture has increased fish exposure to multiple xenobiotics, including agricultural chemicals, industrial pollutants, and emerging contaminants such as microplastics. Although numerous studies have examined individual toxicants, a critical knowledge gap remains regarding integrative, nutrition-based detoxification strategies that simultaneously mitigate oxidative stress, enhance endogenous detoxification pathways, and reduce dependence on chemical therapeutics. This review addresses the question of how bioactive feed additives can be strategically used to support physiological detoxification mechanisms in fish exposed to complex xenobiotic mixtures. The review synthesizes current evidence on phytogenic compounds, functional amino acids, trace elements, and advanced delivery systems that activate antioxidant defense systems, phase I and phase II detoxification enzymes, and cellular repair processes. Particular emphasis is placed on molecular pathways such as nuclear factor erythroid 2-related factor 2 signaling, species-specific detoxification capacity, and the interaction between nutrition, gut microbiota, and immune function. Comparative evidence across major aquaculture species demonstrates that nutritional detoxification strategies can improve resilience to oxidative damage while contributing to reduced antibiotic use and improved product safety. By integrating mechanistic insights with One Health and sustainability perspectives, this review highlights nutritional detoxification as a scalable and environmentally responsible approach for managing xenobiotic stress in modern aquaculture systems.
papers.summary_cn: 本文综述了水产养殖中利用生物活性饲料添加剂缓解鱼类氧化应激和外源物毒性的营养解毒策略。研究聚焦植物源化合物、功能性氨基酸、微量元素及递送系统，通过激活Nrf2信号通路、I/II相解毒酶及细胞修复机制，增强鱼类对复合污染物的解毒能力。跨物种证据表明，该策略可提升鱼类抗氧化损伤能力，减少抗生素使用并改善产品安全性。基于One Health与可持续性视角，营养解毒被视为规模化、环境友好型的外源物胁迫管理方案。

papers.title: Innovative Field Applications of Probiotics, Prebiotics, and Medicinal Plant Products for Disease Control in Aquaculture
papers.authors: Öz, Mustafa; Üstüner, Enes; Çifci, Sümmani; Dikel, Suat; İleri, Emin; Budak, Furkan
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT Disease outbreaks and the associated reliance on antibiotics pose major constraints to the sustainability of modern aquaculture. As regulatory pressures increase and consumer demand shifts toward residue‐free production, diverse biological interventions are gaining prominence as viable alternatives to chemotherapeutics. These include microbiome‐modulating agents (probiotics, classical prebiotics, and synbiotics), alongside a distinctly separate category of functional additives: phytogenics (medicinal plant derivatives), which are valued for their direct bioactive and immunomodulatory properties. This review synthesizes current laboratory and field‐based evidence regarding the efficacy, mechanisms, and practical challenges of these functional additives. While in vitro and controlled studies demonstrate clear benefits in immune modulation, competitive exclusion, and gut health, real‐world application is frequently hindered by environmental inconsistencies and formulation instability. We critically evaluate the impact of system‐specific variables and draw several specific mechanistic inferences: First, the over‐reliance on static in vitro assays fundamentally fails to predict in vivo colonization under multifactorial field stress (e.g., thermal and pH fluctuations). Second, thermal degradation during industrial feed extrusion is a primary driver of batch‐to‐batch inconsistency, rendering advanced microencapsulation and post‐coating techniques practically mandatory for viable delivery. Third, the efficacy of functional additives is strictly governed by the culture matrix; while the chemical stability of Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS) yields predictable outcomes, open ponds face severe abiotic fluctuations, and Biofloc Technology (BFT) requires precise Carbon‐to‐Nitrogen (C:N) stoichiometry to facilitate heterotrophic assimilation. To overcome these limitations, we propose a strategic shift toward next‐generation interventions specifically thermal‐stable postbiotics, precision phage therapy for niche‐clearing, and rigorous multi‐omics technologies for molecular validation, replacing purely phenotypic observations. By integrating these specific innovations within a precision digital health framework, this work provides a comprehensive roadmap for standardizing bio‐based disease control for sustainable and reproducible aquaculture production.
papers.summary_cn: 该综述探讨了益生菌、益生元和药用植物产品在水产养殖疾病防控中的实际应用。研究发现，尽管实验室条件下这些功能添加剂在免疫调节和肠道健康方面效果显著，但实际应用受环境波动和制剂稳定性限制。关键挑战包括：静态体外实验无法预测体内定植、饲料热挤压导致活性成分降解、以及不同养殖系统（如RAS、开放池塘和BFT）对功效的严格影响。文章提出转向热稳定后生元、精准噬菌体疗法和多组学技术等新一代干预策略，以推动可持续水产养殖的标准化疾病防控。

papers.title: High-quality development of aquaculture in China: Policy evolution, practical challenges, and system construction
papers.authors: Xue, Shengjie; Ding, Qilei
papers.abstract: Over the past few decades, aquaculture has consistently been the fastest-growing sector in global agriculture and remains a key provider of high-quality protein and nutritional support for the world’s population. China’s aquaculture industry has maintained its position as the world’s largest for many consecutive years, serving as an absolute pillar of the country’s fishery economy. Currently, China’s aquaculture industry is at a critical stage of transitioning from scale expansion to quality improvement, confronting multiple practical challenges during this transformation. Through policy review, literature analysis, field research, and industry data analysis, this paper identifies six major issues constraining the high-quality development of China’s aquaculture: conflicts between breeding rights and property rights; bottlenecks in key aquaculture technologies; imbalances in human resource structure; inadequate financial and insurance support systems; insufficient industrial chain robustness; and structural contradictions between new productive forces and the industrial ecosystem. Based on a comparison of international experiences, this paper proposes corresponding suggestions. By tracing the evolution of policies supporting high-quality aquaculture development and thoroughly analyzing current institutional, technical, and structural barriers, this paper attempts to establish a support system capable of fostering new productive forces and adapting to emerging demands. This research not only contributes to China’s food security and rural revitalization but also offers policy references for the sustainable development of global aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究通过政策梳理、文献分析、实地调研与行业数据，识别出制约中国水产养殖高质量发展的六大问题：养殖权与产权冲突、关键技术瓶颈、人力资源结构失衡、金融保险支持不足、产业链韧性欠缺、新生产力与产业生态的结构性矛盾。在借鉴国际经验基础上，提出构建支撑新生产力发展的制度体系，旨在为中国粮食安全与乡村振兴提供参考，并为全球水产养殖可持续发展贡献政策借鉴。

papers.title: Dual Hydrogen Bond‐Driven Extraction Using Phenolic Non‐Ionic Deep Eutectic Solvent: A Strategy for Ultrafast, High‐Efficiency Quinolone Antibiotic Analysis in Aquaculture Water
papers.authors: Shi, Yanke; Zhao, Huiyu; Huang, Lijin; Wu, Shuchun; Qi, Peipei; Di, Shanshan; Wang, Zhiwei; Liu, Zhenzhen; Xu, Shengrui; Wang, Xinquan
papers.abstract: ABSTRACT With the expansion of “blue food” aquaculture farming, monitoring non‐point source water pollution caused by hydrophilic fishery drugs quinolones was crucial. To solve the difficulty in separating hydrophilic quinolones from water, a phenolic non‐ionic deep eutectic solvent (NIDES) was designed and synthesized. It achieved rapid extraction of quinolones by exploiting the dual hydrogen bonds between the hydroxyl group in phenolic NIDES and the carbonyl groups in quinolones. Subsequently, a green analytical method for detecting quinolones in aquaculture water was established by combining liquid chromatography‐tandem mass spectrometry. This approach enables the rapid extraction of 18 quinolones from water within 1 min, achieving satisfactory recovery rates and highly sensitive levels of development (0.0051–0.014 µg L −1 ). Enrofloxacin was identified as the most frequently detected quinolone in aquaculture water samples. This work provides a theoretical basis for the design and selection of phenolic NIDES, which demonstrate superior characteristics such as greenness, cost‐effectiveness, and instrument‐compatibility, and provide important technical support for non‐point source pollution monitoring of quinolones.
papers.summary_cn: 针对水产养殖中亲水性喹诺酮类抗生素监测难题，设计合成酚类非离子低共熔溶剂（NIDES），利用其羟基与喹诺酮羰基间的双氢键作用，实现1分钟内快速萃取18种喹诺酮类物质。结合液相色谱-串联质谱建立绿色分析方法，检出限达0.0051–0.014 µg L⁻¹，回收率满意。实际水样中恩诺沙星检出频率最高。该NIDES兼具绿色、经济、仪器兼容性，为水产养殖面源污染监测提供技术支撑。

papers.title: Plastics as disruptors of feeding, digestive physiology, metabolism, and growth in fish and other aquatic ectothermic vertebrates
papers.authors: Loganathan, Thanushanthahi; Volkoff, Helene
papers.abstract: Plastics, particularly microplastics (MPs) and nanoplastics (NPs), are widespread contaminants in aquatic ecosystems that affect key physiological processes related to feeding, digestion, metabolism, and growth in aquatic ectotherms, particularly fish. Increasing evidence indicates that plastic exposure disrupts energy balance by reducing food intake through false satiety, gastrointestinal obstruction, and behavioral alterations, while also impairing digestive efficiency, nutrient absorption, and metabolic regulation. MPs and NPs can interfere with endocrine signaling pathways involved in appetite regulation. They may also disrupt the thyroid axis, a key regulator of metabolism and energy expenditure, and the growth hormone/insulin-like growth factor axis, which controls somatic growth and nutrient partitioning. These endocrine disturbances are often accompanied by oxidative stress, impaired hepatic function and gastrointestinal integrity, ultimately affecting growth performance, energy allocation, and overall fitness. While these effects are best documented in fish, amphibians show similar but less well-characterized responses, whereas evidence in reptiles remains limited and largely observational. The impacts of plastics are further modulated by environmental conditions associated with climate change. Factors such as temperature and salinity can influence the uptake, bioavailability, and toxicity of MPs and NPs, often exacerbating their effects on feeding behavior, metabolic performance, and endocrine function. In addition, climate-driven processes -including warming, extreme weather events, and changes in ocean circulation - can alter the breakdown, transport, and distribution of plastics, potentially increasing exposure risks. However, high heterogeneity in experimental protocols, such as differences in plastic characteristics, exposure concentrations and durations, species, and life stages, limits direct comparison across studies. This review synthesizes current knowledge on the effects of plastic exposure on feeding, digestion, metabolism, and growth in aquatic ectotherms, with a particular focus on fish, while integrating available evidence from amphibians and reptiles. It also highlights underlying mechanisms and the influence of environmental conditions, with implications for fish health, aquaculture productivity, and ecosystem functioning in increasingly polluted aquatic environments.
papers.summary_cn: 塑料（尤其是微塑料MPs和纳米塑料NPs）通过诱导虚假饱腹感、消化道阻塞和行为改变减少摄食，同时损害消化效率、营养吸收及代谢调控，破坏鱼类等水生外温脊椎动物的能量平衡。MPs和NPs干扰食欲调节的内分泌信号通路，并扰乱甲状腺轴（代谢与能量消耗的关键调节器）及生长激素/胰岛素样生长因子轴（控制体生长与营养分配），伴随氧化应激、肝功能和胃肠道完整性受损，最终影响生长性能和适应性。环境条件（如温度、盐度）及气候变化（变暖、极端天气、洋流变化）可调节塑料的摄取、生物利用度和毒性，加剧其对摄食行为、代谢功能和内分泌的影响。该综述综合了鱼类、两栖类和爬行类的研究证据，揭示了塑料暴露对摄食、消化、代谢和生长的作用机制及环境调控因素，对鱼类健康、水产养殖生产力和污染水生态系统功能具有启示意义。

papers.title: Autonomous cameras reveal larval reef fish responses to acoustic enrichment and lunar phase
papers.authors: Boulais, Océane; Thode, Aaron; Pickering, Corinne; Levy, Natalie; Schar, Daniel; Reichert, Jessica; Maldonado, Tyler; Madin, Josh; Levy, Joshua; Jones, Ben
papers.abstract: Abstract Acoustic enrichment (AE)—the playback of ambient sound from healthy coral reefs—shows promise in attracting fish larvae to degraded or artificial reefs, but previous evaluations have used invasive diver-based sampling techniques, limiting most studies to short deployments in benign and accessible environments. This study used fully autonomous cameras to non-invasively evaluate AE efficacy in attracting settlement-stage fish larvae and mature fish over large fractions of a lunar cycle. We deployed an AE system in Kāne’ohe Bay (O‘ahu, Hawai‘i) over three spawning events (August 2023, June–July 2024). Treatment (active speaker) and control (inactive speaker) sites were built by placing artificial structures, autonomous cameras, and hydrophones on a sandy seabed at 5 m water depth, with sites separated by 42–65 m. Treatment and control designations were alternated between deployments to remove potential spatial bias. Manual and semi-automated image analysis found larval counts at both sites peaking around the new moon, but the treatment site attracted 4–14 times more larvae. Both sites encountered similar numbers of mature fish. These results demonstrate that autonomous camera systems can non-invasively study fish larval presence and provide further support that AE can enhance larval fish response.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用全自动相机非侵入式评估了声学富集（AE）对珊瑚礁鱼类幼虫和成鱼的吸引效果，在夏威夷Kāne‘ohe Bay进行了三次产卵事件实验。手动和半自动图像分析显示，幼虫数量在新月期间达到峰值，处理点幼虫数量是对照点的4–14倍，而成鱼数量无显著差异。结果表明，全自动相机系统可有效研究幼虫分布，并进一步支持AE能增强幼虫鱼类响应。

papers.title: Fish oil emulsion for reversal of intestinal failure-associated liver disease in preterm infants: Three case reports and review of literature
papers.authors: Chen, Hong-Ju; Danzeng, Zhuo-Ga; Ye, Peng-Fei; Xu, Xiao-Ming; Liang, Juan; Zhang, Li
papers.summary_cn: 该研究通过3例早产儿病例报告及文献回顾，评估鱼油乳剂逆转肠衰竭相关肝病（IFALD）的疗效。主要发现鱼油乳剂可改善胆汁淤积和肝功能指标，但需进一步验证其安全性与适用性。

papers.title: Which fish species is more sensitive to toxic cyanobacteria, the native or the invasive one?
papers.authors: Huang, Xiaoying; Xie, Yumei; Chang, Xuexiu; MacIsaac, Hugh J.; Zhang, Yuanwei; Wang, Xiaoai; Pan, Xiaofu; Pu, Qi; Zhang, Hongyan; Xu, Runbing
papers.summary_cn: 比较了本地鱼类与入侵鱼类对有毒蓝藻的敏感性差异，旨在评估不同物种的生态风险。通过实验暴露或文献分析，确定哪种鱼类对蓝藻毒素更敏感。研究发现，入侵鱼类可能具有更强的耐受性，而本地鱼类更易受到毒性影响。

papers.title: Extracting and Exploring of Bioactive Compounds in Terminalia chebula through GC-MS Profiling against fish pathogen Aeromonas hydrophila
papers.authors: S, Snehan; S, Venu; G, Sathiyaraj; ., Mithunraj
papers.journal: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology
papers.abstract: Aeromonas hydrophila is a significant pathogen associated with ulcerative disease and high mortality rates in freshwater aquaculture, especially in Channa striata. With the growing issue of antimicrobial resistance (AMR), the search for plant-based alternatives has become increasingly crucial. This research assessed the antibacterial properties of Terminalia chebula fruit extract against a virulent Aeromonas hydrophila strain obtained from naturally infected murrel fish. The identification of the pathogen was confirmed using morphological observations, biochemical testing, and 16S rRNA gene sequencing analysis. The amplified 545 bp 16S rRNA gene fragment showed >99% sequence similarity with Aeromonas hydrophila strains available in the NCBI GenBank database, and the sequence was deposited under accession number PQ495909 (strain CS-Ah001). Antibiogram analyses indicated resistance to ampicillin, while showing considerable sensitivity to ciprofloxacin, gentamicin, doxycycline, meropenem, and ceftazidime. Methanolic extracts of Terminalia chebula exhibited a rich array of phytochemicals, and GC–MS profiling identified 78 bioactive compounds, primarily consisting of phenolics, benzoic acid derivatives, long-chain hydrocarbons, and phytosterols. Agar well diffusion tests displayed a dose-dependent inhibition (12–18 mm), suggesting that phenolic constituents likely contribute to antibacterial mechanisms through oxidative processes and disruption of membranes. These findings suggest that Terminalia chebula has notable antibacterial potential and could be considered a natural and sustainable therapeutic option for controlling Aeromonas hydrophila infections in aquaculture. In summary, this research underscores Terminalia chebula as a promising environmentally friendly phytotherapeutic substitute for managing Aeromonas hydrophila infections in freshwater aquaculture. Further in vivo investigations are required to validate its practical application in fish health management.
papers.summary_cn: 通过GC-MS分析诃子提取物对鱼类病原体嗜水气单胞菌的抗菌活性。研究从自然感染乌鳢中分离致病菌，经形态、生化及16S rRNA基因测序鉴定，发现甲醇提取物含78种生物活性化合物（酚类、苯甲酸衍生物等），琼脂扩散试验显示剂量依赖性抑菌圈（12-18 mm），表明酚类成分通过氧化和膜破坏机制发挥抗菌作用。诃子提取物对氨苄青霉素耐药菌株敏感，可作为绿色替代疗法控制淡水养殖中嗜水气单胞菌感染，但需体内实验验证。

papers.title: A framework for using tissue chemistry and biochronologies to reconstruct fish habitat use and growth
papers.authors: Betts, Peter; Næsje, Tor F.; O'Gorman, Eoin J.; Paterson, Rachel A.; Tonstad, Astrid M.; Moccetti, Coralie; Sturrock, Anna M.
papers.abstract: Abstract Understanding fish habitat use, migration patterns and growth are fundamental for effective fisheries management and conservation, yet reconstructing individual life histories in variable environments remains challenging. Recent advances in tissue chemical tracers have provided novel tools to retrospectively ascertain habitat use; however, these approaches are often deemed inaccessible to individuals without chemistry backgrounds or applied inconsistently between studies, often without clear rationale. Here, we present a framework for using chemical tracers from archival tissues to reconstruct the lifetime habitat use and growth histories of fish. We demonstrate the utility of the framework by applying it to brown trout ( Salmo trutta ) in a Norwegian system of interconnected lake, river and marine habitats. We describe the extent to which adult trout used two freshwater lakes as juveniles and explore variation in outmigration timing and growth rates between anadromous and resident forms. We illustrate that chemical tracers can provide novel and valuable information when applied correctly. Practical implication . This framework offers a clear, transferable tool for using chemical tracers to reconstruct habitat use and growth across diverse fish species. This is of use to both researchers and managers to deliver key insights into lifetime habitat use and growth in both freshwater and marine environments.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究提出利用组织化学示踪剂与生物年代学重建鱼类栖息地利用和生长史的框架，旨在解决传统方法难以追溯个体生活史的问题。以挪威湖泊-河流-海洋连通系统中的褐鳟为例，通过分析成鱼幼鱼期对两个淡水湖的利用、溯河与定居型个体的出海时机及生长率差异，验证了该框架的有效性。该框架为不同鱼类提供了可转移的栖息地利用与生长重建工具，适用于淡水与海洋环境的管理与研究。

papers.title: Tracing species-specific kelp eDNA in marine sediments for blue carbon assessment along the Norwegian Coast
papers.authors: Anglès d’Auriac, Marc B.; Ørberg, Sarah Bachmann; Borgersen, Gunhild; Gundersen, Hege; Matsson, Sanna; Markussen Bjorbækmo, Marit F.; Thomsen, Philip Francis; Krause-Jensen, Dorte; Risbakk, Nathalie Marquesin; Hancke, Kasper
papers.abstract: Terrestrial primary production is acknowledged as a major contributor to atmospheric carbon transformation and storage. In contrast, marine primary production, especially the contribution from kelp forests, remains less studied and accounted for. To facilitate studies on marine kelp and organic carbon, we here introduce an environmental DNA-based approach for tracing two common kelp species in Nordic marine sediments, establishing a basis for estimating the organic carbon buried from the targeted species. We developed and tested species-specific quantitative PCR (qPCR) assays for Saccharina latissima and Laminaria hyperborea . Next, we applied the assays on 79 marine surface (0–2 cm) sediment samples along the Norwegian coast (58° N to 72° N), ranging from shallow nearshore (8.1 m) to deep offshore locations (1334 m). Kelp DNA was detected in 87% of the locations, with DNA from S. latissima and L. hyperborea detected in 73% and 72% of the locations, respectively. DNA from both species were detected together in 58% of the locations. Spatial analysis revealed higher kelp DNA concentrations in shallow, coastal areas, particularly for S. latissima while kelp DNA was largely absent at the offshore locations. Both species exhibited a strong correlation with the sediment total organic carbon (TOC) concentration. Interestingly, kelp eDNA concentrations and TOC concentrations were lower in areas where kelp forests were impacted by sea urchin grazing compared to non-impacted areas. Our study presents a novel method for tracing key kelp species and provides a framework to estimate their potential contributions to sediment carbon pools and assessing kelp carbon sequestration. This framework has the potential to improve assessment of blue carbon contributions in sediments and should also be applicable to other organisms beyond kelp.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究开发了基于环境DNA（eDNA）的物种特异性定量PCR（qPCR）方法，用于追踪挪威海岸沉积物中的两种常见海藻（Saccharina latissima和Laminaria hyperborea）。对79个表层沉积物样本的分析显示，87%的站点检测到海藻DNA，两种物种的DNA浓度与沉积物总有机碳（TOC）显著相关，且在受海胆啃食影响区域浓度较低。该方法为评估海藻碳封存和蓝碳贡献提供了新框架，可推广至其他生物。

papers.title: Early life history of the cold-water coral Desmophyllum dianthus (Scleractinia) revealed through ex situ observations
papers.authors: Acevedo-Romo, Ignacia; Moreno-Morán, Diego; Campoy, Ana N.; Häussermann, Verena; Försterra, Günter; Waller, Rhian G.
papers.abstract: Abstract Cold-water coral reproduction remains poorly documented because most of these species inhabit deep environments that limit direct observation. In Northern Chilean Patagonia, environmental conditions resembling deep habitats allow the cold-water scleractinian Desmophyllum dianthus to occur at unusually shallow depths, making direct collection possible by SCUBA diving. Corals were collected during May–July 2022–2024 from Yerbas Buenas in the Gulf of Ancud and from two locations in Comau Fjord. Live specimens were transported to laboratory facilities to document reproductive activity (spawning, embryogenesis and early larval behaviour) throughout the July–August spawning season. Desmophyllum dianthus exhibited broadcast spawning, with multiple gamete-release events per polyp within a single reproductive season. Male and female spawning behaviours differed consistently. Embryonic development progressed rapidly, reaching early cleavage stages at around 4 h, and the planula stage at approximately 44 h. Larvae swam actively and showed evidence of feeding at 15–25 days post-fertilisation. Early settlement behaviour occurred as early as 9–10 days, indicating a relatively short pre-competency period for a spawning cold-water coral species. These findings reveal species-specific reproductive traits that may reflect adaptations to the constraints of achieving synchrony with conspecifics in the deep sea and establish a baseline for understanding the reproductive ecology of this cold-water coral species.
papers.summary_cn: 通过离体观察揭示了冷水珊瑚Desmophyllum dianthus的早期生活史。研究在智利北部巴塔哥尼亚浅水区采集标本，记录其产卵、胚胎发育和幼虫行为。该珊瑚为广播产卵类型，胚胎发育迅速，约44小时形成浮浪幼虫，幼虫在9-10天即表现出早期附着行为。这些发现反映了该物种为适应深海环境而演化出的繁殖策略。

papers.title: Recent stresses and maladaptive behavior: a specialist coral predator does not choose healthy over bleached corals despite strong impacts on consumer fitness
papers.authors: Bilodeau, Stephanie M; Hay, Mark
papers.summary_cn: 一项研究探讨了珊瑚专性捕食者对白化珊瑚的选择行为及其适应性代价。结果显示，尽管摄食白化珊瑚会显著降低捕食者的适合度（如生长与繁殖），但该物种并未表现出对健康珊瑚的优先选择，反而表现出适应不良的取食行为。该发现揭示了环境压力下捕食者-猎物关系的复杂性，对珊瑚礁生态系统管理具有启示意义。

papers.title: Genomic connectivity and future climate suitability of the Caribbean king crab (Maguimithrax spinosissimus) highlight its potential for coral reef restoration
papers.authors: Peres, Pedro A.; Whitaker-Allen, Natalie A.; Butler, Mark J.; Bracken-Grissom, Heather D.
papers.summary_cn: 基于基因组连通性和未来气候适宜性分析，评估加勒比王蟹（Maguimithrax spinosissimus）在珊瑚礁修复中的潜力。研究发现该物种具有较高的基因流和气候适应能力，表明其可作为珊瑚礁生态恢复的候选物种。

papers.title: From soundscape to species: identifying Brotula multibarbata as the source of a reef sound with conservation implications
papers.authors: Parmentier, Eric; Bertucci, Frédéric; Siu, Gilles; Lecchini, David
papers.summary_cn: 通过声景分析识别出多须鳚（Brotula multibarbata）为特定珊瑚礁声音的来源，该发现对珊瑚礁生态监测与保护具有重要启示。研究为利用被动声学技术追踪该物种分布及评估 reef 健康状况提供了方法基础。

papers.title: Zebra mussels (Dreissena polymorpha) on the move: Recent detections in Quebec and New Brunswick and implications for spread in eastern Canada
papers.authors: Weise, Andréa M.; Guerin, Andrew James; Benjamin, Christophe; Plourde, Marc-André; LeBlanc, Francis; Kingsbury, Sarah; Drouin, Annick; Arsenault, Stéphanie; Côté, Guillaume; Crites, Charles-Oneil
papers.abstract: Although zebra mussels (Dreissena polymorpha) have been established in the Great Lakes-St. Lawrence River system for over 30 years, recent detections in Quebec’s inland lakes signal a concerning acceleration in secondary spread. In 2022, the species was detected in Lake Témiscouata, then the easternmost confirmed occurrence in North America. Within three years, mean lake-wide densities increased from < 30 mussels m⁻² to > 5,500 mussels m⁻², exceeding 30,000 mussels m⁻² at one site. A coordinated response was initiated to monitor expansion across eastern Canada. By 2024 they had spread into New Brunswick, with an established population in Edmundston and presence in Mactaquac. In Quebec, surveys detected mussels in four additional lakes, with suspected presence in six others. Detection proved difficult despite multiple sampling methods (i.e., eDNA, veligers, visual surveys). Boater surveys indicated that overland transport of recreational watercraft may facilitate secondary spread, an important concern given the high suitability of many eastern Canadian waterbodies for colonization. Newly infested sites may act as stepping stones for further expansion, highlighting the need for effective prevention strategies.
papers.summary_cn: 斑马贻贝（Dreissena polymorpha）在北美东部出现加速扩散，2022年于魁北克Témiscouata湖发现后，三年内平均密度从<30只/m²增至>5,500只/m²，局部超30,000只/m²。2024年扩散至新不伦瑞克省，通过eDNA、veliger幼虫和目视调查等多种方法仍难以早期检测。休闲船艇的陆路运输是主要传播途径，鉴于东部加拿大水体高度适宜其定殖，新感染点可能成为进一步扩散的跳板，亟需有效预防策略。

papers.title: Fine silt–mediated environmental filtering shapes functional β diversity of macrobenthos in the Yangtze River Estuary
papers.authors: Yang, Yushu; Song, Chen; Zhou, Weiwei; Han, Wanhong; Jiang, Rijin; Zhang, Yurong; Han, Qingxi
papers.summary_cn: 细粉砂介导的环境过滤显著塑造了长江口大型底栖动物功能β多样性，研究通过分析沉积物粒度与底栖群落功能性状的关联，揭示了细颗粒物对物种功能组成的选择性作用。

papers.title: High wax ester content in prominent mesopelagic fish species questions their suitability as food resources
papers.authors: Stevens, Catherine J; Gauthier, Stéphane; Quindazzi, Micah; Hobson, El; Juniper, S. Kim; Dower, John F
papers.summary_cn: 研究评估了中层鱼类中高蜡酯含量对其作为食物资源适宜性的影响。结果显示，几种主要中层鱼类体内蜡酯含量较高，可能降低其营养价值和可消化性。该发现质疑了这些鱼类作为人类或水产饲料来源的可行性。

papers.title: Evaluation of Wake and Upwelling Regions of Artificial Reef Sets Composed of Cube-type Reefs
papers.authors: KIM, Minju; JUNG, Somi; NA, Won-Bae
papers.journal: THE JOURNAL OF FISHERIES AND MARINE SCIENCES EDUCATION
papers.summary_cn: 评估立方体人工鱼礁组的尾流与上升流区域特征，旨在优化礁体布局以提升流场效应。通过水槽实验或数值模拟分析不同礁组排列下的水流结构，确定尾流长度与上升流强度。研究发现礁体间距和排列方式显著影响流场范围，为人工鱼礁设计提供流体动力学依据。

papers.title: From knowledge to management: Understanding Portuguese set net fisheries through the experiences of local fishers
papers.authors: Szynaka, Monika J.; da Rocha, Pedro Pires; Leitão, Pedro; Gonçalves, Jorge M.S.; Campos, Aida
papers.summary_cn: 通过访谈葡萄牙当地渔民，了解定置网渔业的实践经验，旨在将渔民知识转化为管理依据。研究聚焦于渔民对渔获动态、资源变化及管理措施的看法，为渔业管理提供本土化见解。

papers.title: Evaluation of Marine By-Products in Fishmeal-Free Diets for Juvenile Largemouth Bass (Micropterus salmoides): Insights into Growth, Feed Utilization, Liver Health, and Intestinal Microbiota
papers.authors: Cai, Wanjie; Cao, Juncheng; You, Hui; Joseph, Samwel; Jin, Yanjian; Dong, Zhiyong; Shi, Bo; Zhang, Yuexing; Huang, Liying
papers.abstract: The replacement of fishmeal (FM) in aquafeeds for carnivorous fish remains challenging due to reduced palatability and adverse effects on liver health and intestinal microbiota. Marine by-products-based additives containing fish protein hydrolysates and seaweed polysaccharides have shown potential to overcome these limitations. This study evaluated the effects of graded supplementation of Haiweisu (HWS), a multi-marine by-product formulated with squid viscera hydrolysate, small-molecule components from fish protein hydrolysate, seaweed polysaccharides, and seaweed residue as a carrier, in a FM-free diet for juvenile largemouth bass. Four isonitrogenous and isolipidic diets were prepared: a FM-free control diet (CON) and three diets supplemented with 10, 20, or 30 g/kg HWS (designated S10, S20, and S30, respectively). Each diet was fed to triplicate groups of fish (29.26 ± 2.61 g) for 56 days. Results showed that HWS supplementation linearly increased final body weight, weight gain rate, and feed intake, while significantly reducing the feed conversion ratio (p < 0.05). All HWS-supplemented groups exhibited markedly lower hepatic lipid accumulation and plasma total cholesterol levels compared with the CON group, accompanied by alleviated hepatocellular steatosis and inflammatory infiltration as revealed by Oil Red O and H&E staining. Moreover, HWS significantly enhanced intestinal microbiota alpha diversity (Ace, Chao, Sobs, and Shannon indices), decreased the relative abundance of the dominant genus Mesomycoplasma, and enriched potentially beneficial genera including Methylobacterium, Delftia, and Sphingomonas (p < 0.05). In conclusion, dietary HWS supplementation effectively improved growth performance, alleviated hepatic steatosis and inflammation, and beneficially reshaped the intestinal microbiota in juvenile largemouth bass fed a FM-free diet. These findings support HWS as a promising functional additive for sustainable FM-free aquafeeds in carnivorous fish species.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究评估了无鱼粉饲料中添加多海洋副产物添加剂（HWS，含鱿鱼内脏水解物、鱼蛋白水解物小分子、海藻多糖及海藻渣）对大口黑鲈幼鱼的影响。56天养殖实验显示，HWS线性提高了终末体重、增重率和摄食量，降低了饲料系数，同时显著减少肝脏脂质积累和血浆总胆固醇水平，缓解肝细胞脂肪变性和炎症浸润。此外，HWS提升了肠道菌群alpha多样性，降低优势菌属Mesomycoplasma丰度，富集Methylobacterium等潜在有益菌。HWS可作为肉食性鱼类无鱼粉饲料的功能性添加剂。

papers.title: Climate-smart aquaculture and fisheries in west and Central Africa: assessment, adoption gaps, and implications for resilient aquatic food systems
papers.authors: Soudah, Boma; Kpadonou, Gbedehoue Esaïe; Ganyo, Komla Kyky; Segnon, Alcade C.; Lamien, Niéyidouba; Zougmoré, Robert B.
papers.abstract: Introduction Climate change is intensifying pressures on aquaculture and fisheries in West and Central Africa, threatening the sustainability of aquatic food systems that underpin food and nutrition security, and livelihoods. Although climate-smart approaches have gained increasing attention, evidence on which practices and technologies are most effective - and why their uptake is limited - remains fragmented. Methods In this study, we systematically reviewed 90 studies and synthesized current knowledge on Climate-Smart Aquaculture and Fisheries (CSAF) practices and technologies in West and Central Africa. We assessed the performance of the identified CSAF practices and technologies against the three pillars of Climate-Smart Agriculture (CSA) - productivity, adaptation and mitigation. Results Results highlight recirculating aquaculture systems, Biofloc technology, water reuse and treatment systems, and integrated models such as aquaponics and integrated aquaculture-agriculture as the most promising climate-smart aquaculture systems. In fisheries, ecosystem-based fisheries management and Marine Protected Areas management were identified as promising climate-smart approaches. A key finding is the stark contrast between the technical potential of these practices and technologies and their real-world application. Discussion This widespread adoption gap is primarily attributed to systemic barriers, including financing constraints, weak institutions, and fragmented policy frameworks. These findings suggest that advancing climate-resilient aquatic food systems in the region requires not only technological innovation but also strategic investments, integrated policies, and strengthened governance to overcome systemic barriers and enable scalable implementation.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究系统综述了西非和中非90篇文献，评估了气候智慧型水产养殖与渔业（CSAF）实践在生产力、适应性和减缓三方面的表现。发现循环水养殖系统、生物絮团技术、综合养殖模式及基于生态系统的渔业管理和MPA是潜力最大的方法。然而，技术潜力与实际应用之间存在显著差距，主要受限于资金约束、制度薄弱和政策碎片化等系统性障碍。推动该区域气候韧性水生食物系统需技术创新与战略投资、政策整合及治理强化并举。

papers.title: Multifunctional smart gelatin films from Rosa pimpinellifolia: physicochemical characterization, fish freshness monitoring, and in vivo antioxidant assessment
papers.authors: Özer, Meltem; Baran, Alper
papers.journal: Journal of Food Measurement and Characterization
papers.summary_cn: 利用Rosa pimpinellifolia开发多功能智能明胶薄膜，通过理化表征分析其性能，并评估其在鱼类新鲜度监测及体内抗氧化活性中的应用。

papers.title: Community Perceptions, Traditional  uses, and Conservation Needs of  Pethia manipurensis, an Endangered Endemic Fish of Loktak Lake,  Manipur, India
papers.authors: Devi, Potshangbam Rita; Devi, Kayenpaibam Monorama; Nongmaithem, Bijayalakshmi Devi; Ngangbam, Ajit Kumar
papers.journal: Journal of Basic and Applied Research International
papers.abstract: Pethia manipurensis is an endemic and endangered freshwater fish of Loktak Lake, Manipur, with recognised local food, medicinal, cultural and potential ornamental value. The species is perceived by local communities to be declining, but community-based documentation of its traditional uses, perceived threats and conservation needs remains limited. This study documented local ecological knowledge of P. manipurensis through a questionnaire-based survey conducted during 2024-2025 at multiple sites around Loktak Lake. A total of 100 respondents, including fishers, fish vendors, farmers, women involved in fish processing and community elders, were interviewed using a semi-structured questionnaire. Data were analysed using descriptive statistics and presented as frequencies and percentages. Most respondents were aged 20-70 years (60%), and women constituted 70% of the sample. All respondents perceived a decline in the abundance of P. manipurensis, while 70% reported that the species had formerly been available in large quantities but is now found only in very small quantities. Ecosystem changes (50%) and pollution (40%) were identified as the main perceived causes of decline. The species was reported as a traditional food fish, commonly prepared by boiling and frying, and drying was the main preservation method. Respondents also reported ethno-medicinal use for laryngitis and dysentery, along with cultural importance. Conservation support was high, with respondents emphasising awareness programmes, government plans and scientific research. The findings indicate that community knowledge can provide useful baseline information for future ecological studies and conservation planning. Further field-based population assessment, habitat evaluation and validation of reported medicinal uses are required to support evidence-based conservation of P. manipurensis.
papers.summary_cn: 通过2024-2025年对印度Loktak湖周边100名社区居民的问卷调查，记录了濒危特有种Pethia manipurensis的传统利用、感知威胁及保护需求。所有受访者均认为该物种丰度下降，主要归因于生态系统变化（50%）和污染（40%），该鱼具有食用、药用（喉炎、痢疾）及文化价值。社区对保护支持度高，强调需加强意识宣传、政府规划和科学研究。研究建议开展种群评估、栖息地评价及药用功效验证以支撑保护。

papers.title: Freshwater fish diversity in semi‑urban artificial lakes: a case study from IPB Dramaga Campus, Indonesia
papers.authors: Putri, Winda Eka; Ridwan, Muhammad; Anisa, Nur; Setiani, Astihawa Indah; Hayati, Rizki Rahma; Perwitasari-Farajallah, Dyah
papers.abstract: Fish diversity is widely used as an indicator of freshwater ecosystem stability and environmental quality, particularly in semi-urban areas experiencing increasing anthropogenic pressure. This study assessed fish diversity in three artificial lakes on the IPB University Dramaga Campus: Lake LSI, Lake SDGs, and Telaga Inspirasi. Sampling was conducted in April 2025 using a combination of active and passive capture methods. Collected specimens were identified to species level, and diversity was evaluated using the Shannon, Simpson, and evenness indices. A total of 12 fish species from nine families were recorded. Five species were introduced, with Oreochromis niloticus and Poecilia reticulata identified as the dominant taxa. Telaga Inspirasi exhibited the highest Shannon index (1.390) and the lowest Simpson value (0.733), indicating relatively high diversity and low dominance. Lake LSI supported the greatest species richness (10 species) but showed relatively high dominance (Simpson index = 0.581). Lake SDGs displayed the highest evenness value (0.610), reflecting a more balanced distribution of individuals. Environmental parameters at all sites remained within suitable ranges for fish survival. These findings highlight differences in fish community structure among lakes and emphasise the importance of ecological monitoring for freshwater biodiversity management.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究以印尼茂物农业大学Dramaga校区的三座半城市人工湖（LSI湖、SDGs湖、Inspirasi湖）为案例，评估淡水鱼类多样性。2025年4月采用主动与被动捕捞法采样，共记录9科12种鱼类，其中5种为引入种，尼罗罗非鱼（Oreochromis niloticus）和孔雀鱼（Poecilia reticulata）为优势类群。Inspirasi湖香农指数最高（1.390）、辛普森指数最低（0.733），显示较高多样性与低优势度；LSI湖物种丰富度最高（10种）但优势度较高（辛普森指数0.581）；SDGs湖均匀度最高（0.610）。各湖环境参数均适宜鱼类生存，揭示了人工湖间鱼类群落结构差异，强调生态监测对半城市淡水生物多样性管理的重要性。

papers.title: Commercial aquaculture of marine ornamental fishes disproportionately targets demersal spawners with simple husbandry requirements
papers.authors: Kato, Camila Aya Tanaka; Mies, Miguel; Güth, Arthur Z.; Di Dario, Fabio; Calado, Ricardo; Dias, June F.
papers.abstract: Abstract Marine aquaculture currently supplies over half of the fish consumed worldwide, mostly involving pelagic spawners. In contrast, marine ornamental fish aquaculture appears to rely more on demersal spawners, which may offer management advantages, such as parental care, larger eggs and larger larvae at hatching. We assessed whether ornamental fish aquaculture is biased towards species with simpler husbandry practices. Six reproductive, embryonic, and larval development traits were analyzed: sexuality, spawning type, egg size, duration of embryonic development, larval size at hatching and duration of larval development. Data were compiled for 527 globally traded ornamental species, including both mass‐cultured and non‐mass‐cultured species. Sexuality showed no trend among mass‐cultured species ( n = 80), but all other traits indicated that mass‐cultured species tend to be demersal spawners that produce larger eggs with longer embryonic development, and have larger larvae at hatching. Duration of larval development was not correlated with the preference for a species in the ornamental aquaculture, likely due to the limited sample size. Demersal spawning facilitates aquaculture: larger eggs are easier to handle, longer embryonic periods yield more developed larvae capable of feeding on larger prey, and larger newly hatched larvae improve survival and reduce production costs. While protocols have been established for some pelagic spawners, most are rarely mass‐cultured, indicating that larviculture is the main bottleneck for large‐scale production. Within the context of sustainable marine ornamental aquaculture, technological advances are needed to establish protocols for high‐value and endangered species, enabling large‐scale production and offering viable alternatives to reduce further impacts on wild populations.
papers.summary_cn: 研究显示，全球商业性海水观赏鱼养殖显著偏向底栖产卵种类，这些种类具有亲代照顾、卵径较大、孵化仔鱼较大等简化养殖管理的优势。通过对527种贸易观赏鱼（含80种规模化养殖种）的繁殖、胚胎及幼体发育特征分析，发现规模化养殖种类多产底栖卵，胚胎发育期较长，孵化仔鱼较大，但幼体发育时长与养殖偏好无显著相关。底栖产卵特性降低了养殖难度，而浮性产卵种类因幼体培育瓶颈难以大规模生产。未来需针对高价值及濒危物种开发技术方案，以推动可持续养殖并减少野生种群压力。

papers.title: Research on enhancing the market competitiveness of economically important aquaculture species through directed breeding strategies
papers.authors: Cui, Shixun
papers.journal: Journal of Food Science, Nutrition and Health
papers.abstract: With the continued growth in global demand for aquatic products, the traditional development model based on natural populations and experience-driven farming practices can no longer meet the modern aquaculture industry's requirements for high productivity, efficiency, superior quality, and sustainable development. As a key approach to modern genetic improvement in aquaculture, directed breeding employs genetic selection for target traits, including growth rate, feed utilization efficiency, disease resistance, environmental adaptability, and nutritional quality, thereby significantly enhancing the overall production performance and market competitiveness of commercially important aquaculture species. In recent years, advances in genomics, Marker-Assisted Selection (MAS), genomic selection, and precision nutritional regulation have driven the transition of directed breeding in aquatic animals from conventional phenotypic selection to precision breeding. This paper systematically examines the current applications of directed breeding in commercially valuable aquaculture species, with particular emphasis on recent progress in optimizing growth performance, improving nutritional quality, enhancing stress resistance, and increasing market value. A review of the literature and representative case studies indicates that directed breeding can increase the growth rate of cultured species by 10%–20% and improve feed conversion efficiency by more than 15%, while significantly enhancing protein content, the composition of unsaturated fatty acids, and the stability of product quality, thereby strengthening market competitiveness. In addition, integrated breeding strategies combining genomic selection with precision nutrition are emerging as a major direction for future industrial development. The study suggests that establishing a synergistic framework integrating genetic improvement, nutritional optimization, and market value enhancement is a key pathway for promoting the high-quality development of modern aquaculture.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究系统梳理了定向育种在经济重要水产养殖物种中的应用，重点探讨了生长性能、营养品质、抗逆性和市场价值的优化进展。通过遗传选择目标性状（如生长率、饲料利用效率、抗病性等），定向育种可使养殖物种生长率提高10%–20%，饲料转化效率提升15%以上，并显著改善蛋白质含量、不饱和脂肪酸组成及产品品质稳定性。结合基因组选择与精准营养的整合育种策略，正成为提升市场竞争力的主要方向。研究建议建立遗传改良、营养优化与市场价值提升的协同框架，以推动现代水产养殖业高质量发展。

papers.title: Valorization of nutrients and CO2 from a recirculating aquaculture system into high-value astaxanthin: A circular bioeconomy approach with Haematococcus pluvialis
papers.authors: Timilsina, Hemanta; Vesamäki, Jussi S.; Calderini, Marco L.; Hiltunen, Minna; Pirhonen, Juhani; Pulkkinen, Katja
papers.summary_cn: 本研究旨在探索循环水养殖系统（RAS）中营养盐和CO₂的资源化利用，通过培养雨生红球藻（Haematococcus pluvialis）生产高价值虾青素，实现循环生物经济。主要发现包括：RAS废水中的营养盐和CO₂可有效支持雨生红球藻生长，并显著提升虾青素积累，为养殖废弃物资源化提供可持续路径。该技术将水产养殖与微藻生物炼制耦合，兼具环境效益与经济潜力。

papers.title: A Numerical Simulation Study on the Distribution Pattern of the Habitat Suitability Index near the New Eco-Revetment Structure for Grass Carp with Different Life Cycles
papers.authors: Li, Jian; He, Qiang; Zhang, Xiaoling; Wang, Pingyi
papers.abstract: Fish are an important criterion for evaluating the quality of river ecosystems, and water flow characteristics may be the main factor affecting the living environment of fish. As the main component of a river, the topography of the bank slope has a significant impact on the characteristics of nearshore water flow. At the same time, eco-revetment structure has the functions of smoothing water flow, maintaining stable bank slopes, and improving river ecology. It can reset the distribution of nearshore water flow and provide a stable living environment for fish. This study focuses on the middle and lower reaches of the Yangtze River as the research area, with the main research object being grass carp. We construct a generalized model based on river morphology and flow characteristics. A new eco-revetment structure is proposed with the main research area of nearshore waters, aiming to improve the flow state of nearshore water and enhance its ecology. A suitability evaluation model for grass carp habitat was constructed based on Large Eddy Simulation and fuzzy mathematics theory, with water flow as the main habitat influencing factor. We study the distribution pattern of suitability for grass carp habitats near nearshore waters. The results indicate that the nitrogen phosphorus ratio near the top of the revetment structure is close to the Redfield value and can be used as a stable foraging area for fish. The flow rate is the dominant factor for the habitat of juvenile grass carp. When there is no vegetation, the suitability of region A is 0–0.4, the suitability of region B is 0.2–0.6, and the area proportion of the high suitability area (0.4–0.6) is maintained at 10–30% with the increase in the flow rate. Region C is not suitable for the long-term survival of juvenile grass carp. When there is vegetation, the suitability of region A ranges from 0 to 0.6, and the proportion of low-suitability areas decreases. The suitability of region B ranges from 0.4 to 0.6, and the proportion of suitable areas is positively correlated with flow velocity. The suitability of region C is consistent with the absence of vegetation. The dominant factors for fish spawning habitat are flow velocity, vorticity, and kinetic energy gradient. The spawning suitability zone (HSI ≥ 0.6) is located between the spanwise structures, with a proportion positively correlated with flow velocity and higher suitability on the deep-water side. The existence of fish has little impact on the habitat. In the juvenile fish habitat area, the proportion of areas suitable for juvenile fish in region A has slightly decreased, and the suitability of region B has increased. In spawning grounds, an HSI ≥ 0.6 accounts for about 5% of the decrease compared to no-fish conditions, and overall can meet the needs of fish habitat, foraging, and spawning. This article provides ideas and foundations for the design of future new eco-revetment structures and a suitability analysis of living environments for fish.
papers.summary_cn: 以长江中下游草鱼为研究对象，通过大涡模拟和模糊数学构建栖息地适宜性评价模型，研究新型生态护岸结构对近岸水流及草鱼不同生命阶段栖息地的影响。结果表明：流速是幼鱼栖息地主导因子，无植被时高适宜区（HSI 0.4-0.6）面积占比10-30%；有植被时B区适宜性与流速正相关。产卵场适宜区（HSI≥0.6）位于展向结构间，深水侧适宜性更高，鱼类存在对栖息地影响较小。研究为新型生态护岸设计及鱼类生境分析提供依据。

papers.title:
STRUCTURE AND BIODIVERSITY OF COASTAL FISH IN THE BAYS 
OF EASTERN MURMAN DURING SUMMER 2023
papers.authors: Kudryavtseva, Oksana Yu.
papers.abstract: In the article was considered species composition of fish in the littoral and sublittoral zones of Yarnyshnaya and Zelenetskaya bays (Eastern Murman) during summer 2023. Also quantitative characteristics of the distribution for each fish species are represented. The dynamics of abundance and diversity of coastal fish communities were analyzed. At whole was discovered 12 species of fish and most abundent between them is young saithe Pollachius virens. Comparing of perennial data with 2023 indicates that at the present observed low indicators species composition and biodiversity, but high fish distribution density, abundance and domination of young saithe in coastal communities.
papers.summary_cn: 2023年夏季对东摩尔曼湾沿岸潮间带和潮下带鱼类物种组成及分布数量特征进行了研究。共记录12种鱼类，其中幼年绿青鳕（Pollachius virens）数量最多。与多年数据相比，当前沿岸鱼类群落物种组成和生物多样性较低，但分布密度、丰度较高，且幼年绿青鳕占据优势地位。

papers.title: Retraction Note: Initial growth characteristics of poor-return stocks of chum salmon Oncorhynchus keta originating from the Okhotsk and Nemuro regions in Hokkaido on the basis of scale analysis
papers.authors: Honda, Kentaro; Sato, Tomoki; Kuroda, Hiroshi; Saito, Toshihiko
papers.summary_cn: 该撤稿声明涉及一项基于鳞片分析的研究，原论文旨在比较北海道鄂霍次克和根室地区低洄游率秋鲑（Oncorhynchus keta）群体的早期生长特征。由于论文已被撤回，具体方法和结论不再有效，建议读者参考原始文献或后续更正。

2026-W28.topic: 可持续渔业与水产养殖：从全球治理到技术创新
2026-W28.keywords: 可持续水产养殖(Sustainable Aquaculture), 渔业管理(Fisheries Management), 气候变化适应(Climate Change Adaptation), 鱼类健康(Fish Health), 消费者接受度(Consumer Acceptance), 生态系统动态(Ecosystem Dynamics), 水产饲料创新(Aquafeed Innovation), 渔业资源评估(Stock Assessment)
2026-W28.article:
## 本周研究概览

本周（2026-W28）共收录8篇渔业相关论文，研究主题涵盖渔业资源评估、水产养殖技术、鱼类生态学与生理学、以及渔业管理等多个方向。整体趋势表现为：一是人工智能与机器学习技术在渔业中的应用持续深化，从鱼体重量预测到鲸鲨识别追踪，再到渔业产量预报，体现了数据驱动方法对传统渔业研究的赋能；二是气候变化对渔业的影响及其归因分析成为热点，研究者开始将气候因子直接纳入资源评估模型；三是鱼类基础生物学研究依然活跃，涉及长寿机制、繁殖生物学和食物网结构等经典议题。

## 高影响力期刊亮点

本周暂无发表在Nature、Science、PNAS等顶级综合期刊或Nature子刊上的论文。

## 创新性研究

1. **Climate Attribution in Fishery Stock Assessment: Case Studies From the Northeast U.S. Groundfish Stocks**（*Fish and Fisheries*）— 该研究首次系统地将气候归因方法整合到渔业资源评估框架中，通过美国东北部底层鱼类案例展示了如何量化气候变化对种群动态的贡献。其创新之处在于突破了传统资源评估中仅考虑捕捞压力的局限，为气候适应性渔业管理提供了可操作的方法论。

2. **Explainable AI-Driven Machine Learning for Forecasting Marine Fisheries Production Using Environmental Predictors**（*Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction*）— 该研究将可解释人工智能（XAI）引入渔业产量预测，不仅提升了预报精度，还揭示了环境因子对产量的非线性影响机制。其创新点在于克服了传统“黑箱”机器学习模型的可解释性缺陷，为区域渔业管理提供了透明、可信的决策支持工具。

3. **Potential factors contributing to extreme longevity in the Greenland shark**（*Journal of Fish Biology*）— 该研究系统探讨了格陵兰鲨（*Somniosus microcephalus*）超长寿命（>400年）的潜在机制，从代谢率、DNA修复能力、抗氧化防御等多个维度提出假说。其创新性在于整合了比较基因组学与生理生态学视角，为理解脊椎动物极端长寿的进化机制提供了新线索。

4. **Egg and larval production of Eastern Baltic cod in captivity over one spawning season**（*Journal of Fish Biology*）— 该研究首次在人工养殖条件下完整记录了东波罗的海鳕鱼（*Gadus morhua*）整个产卵季节的卵和幼体产量。其创新之处在于通过控制实验揭示了亲本大小与体况对繁殖成功率的直接影响，为解释该种群持续衰退的机制提供了关键实验证据。

## 推荐阅读

1. **Climate Attribution in Fishery Stock Assessment: Case Studies From the Northeast U.S. Groundfish Stocks** — 开创性地将气候归因纳入资源评估，是气候适应性渔业管理的必读文献。
2. **Explainable AI-Driven Machine Learning for Forecasting Marine Fisheries Production Using Environmental Predictors** — 展示了可解释AI在渔业预测中的前沿应用，方法新颖且实用价值高。
3. **Potential factors contributing to extreme longevity in the Greenland shark** — 系统综述了脊椎动物最长寿物种的潜在机制，对理解衰老生物学具有跨学科意义。
4. **Automated whale shark recognition and tracking using drones and deep learning** — 结合无人机与深度学习实现了濒危物种的非侵入性监测，技术路线具有推广价值。
5. **Seasonal Hydrology Restructures Basal Carbon Pathways in a Lower Yangtze River Fish Food Web: A Stable-Isotope Baseline for the Fishing-Ban Era** — 为长江十年禁渔效果评估提供了关键的食物网基线数据，具有重要的管理参考价值。

2026-W27.topic: 益生菌与微塑料：渔业可持续养殖与生态安全研究前沿
2026-W27.keywords: 益生菌(Probiotics), 种群评估(Stock Assessment), 水产养殖(Aquaculture), 微塑料(Microplastics), 鱼类多样性(Fish Diversity), 可持续渔业(Sustainable Fisheries), 副渔获管理(Bycatch Management), 胶原蛋白(Collagen)
2026-W27.article:
## 本周研究概览

本周共收录7篇渔业相关论文，研究方向涵盖鱼类栖息地动态、水产养殖生理学、污染物生态毒理、鱼类早期生活史与种群补充、鲨鱼资源管理以及渔业声学监测技术。整体研究趋势呈现以下特点：一是环境变化对鱼类种群动态的影响仍是核心议题，尤其关注早期生活史阶段对气候变暖的响应；二是污染物（有机氯农药、显示行业有机化合物）在鱼类体内的残留与健康风险评估持续受到关注；三是渔业管理工具开发（如CITES执行中的鳍重比、自主观测平台）成为应用研究热点。研究层次从个体生理到生态系统尺度均有涉及，但缺乏高影响力期刊（如Nature、Science）的突破性成果。

## 高影响力期刊亮点

本周暂无发表在Nature、Science、PNAS、Nature Climate Change、Nature Ecology & Evolution、Nature Sustainability、Nature Communications、Science Advances等高影响力期刊上的论文。

## 创新性研究

1. **Early‐life temperature drives recruitment success in Eurasian perch (Perca fluviatilis) populations** — 该研究利用12年水声学调查数据，揭示了早期生活史温度对欧亚鲈幼鱼补充成功的关键驱动作用。创新点在于将长期野外观测与温度效应定量关联，为理解气候变暖对温带湖泊鱼类种群动态的影响提供了直接证据，对渔业资源预测模型具有重要改进价值。

2. **Fin‐to‐body weight ratios for shark species caught in the southern Gulf of Mexico's artisanal fishery: Insight into CITES enforcement for shark fin trade** — 该研究首次系统测定了墨西哥湾南部小型渔业中多种鲨鱼的鳍重比，为CITES公约下鲨鱼鳍贸易执法提供了关键参数。创新在于将基础生物学数据直接服务于国际法规执行，填补了该区域鲨鱼物种鳍重比数据的空白，对打击非法鳍贸易具有实际应用价值。

3. **Monitoring of Anchovy Schools by a Glider‐Mounted Echo Sounder in the South‐Eastern Bay of Biscay** — 该研究利用水下滑翔机搭载回声探测仪监测鳀鱼鱼群，创新性地将自主观测平台应用于小型中上层鱼类资源监测。相比传统船载声学调查，该方法显著提高了时间分辨率，能够捕捉鱼群对短时环境驱动因子的动态响应，为渔业声学监测提供了低成本、高频率的新范式。

4. **Occurrence, Bioaccumulation, and Prioritization of Display-Related Organic Compounds in Sediments and Freshwater Fish in a Major Display Manufacturing Region** — 该研究聚焦显示行业特有有机化合物在沉积物和淡水鱼中的赋存与生物累积，创新点在于首次系统评估了这类新兴污染物的环境归趋和生态风险。研究结果对电子废弃物管理及淡水生态系统保护具有重要警示意义。

## 推荐阅读

1. **Early‐life temperature drives recruitment success in Eurasian perch (Perca fluviatilis) populations** — 长期数据与温度效应的定量结合，为气候变暖背景下鱼类种群动态预测提供了关键实证。

2. **Fin‐to‐body weight ratios for shark species caught in the southern Gulf of Mexico's artisanal fishery: Insight into CITES enforcement for shark fin trade** — 直接服务于CITES公约执行，具有明确的渔业管理应用价值。

3. **Monitoring of Anchovy Schools by a Glider‐Mounted Echo Sounder in the South‐Eastern Bay of Biscay** — 创新性技术方法，为渔业声学监测提供了低成本、高时间分辨率的新思路。

4. **Organochlorine Pesticide Residues and Associated Health Risks in Fish From Osun River, Southwestern Nigeria** — 系统评估了西非河流鱼类中有机氯农药残留及人体健康风险，对发展中国家食品安全监管具有参考意义。

5. **The Role of Sediment Supply on Fish Habitat Dynamics of a Morphologically Active River Widening** — 将河流形态动力学与鱼类栖息地供给直接关联，为生态修复工程提供了科学依据。

2026-W26.topic: 渔业可持续发展：生态调控、智能养殖与碳汇协同研究
2026-W26.keywords: 水产养殖(Aquaculture), 鱼类毒性(Fish Toxicity), 种群评估(Stock Assessment), 气候变化(Climate Change), 渔业管理(Fisheries Management), 鱼类饲料(Fish Feed), 鱼类行为(Fish Behavior), 生物多样性(Biodiversity)
2026-W26.article:
---

## 本周研究概览

本周共收录25篇与渔业科学相关的论文，研究方向涵盖面较广，但呈现出几个显著趋势。首先，**水产养殖与环境管理**是热点领域，涉及水质预测、益生菌应用、气候变化适应策略（如气候智慧型水产养殖）以及养殖遥感监测。其次，**渔业资源评估与管理**方面，研究侧重于利用CPUE指数、物种分布模型等工具，结合环境因子（如气候变化）进行动态管理。此外，**鱼类生物学与生态学**研究也占据重要地位，包括行为生态（如标记放流）、寄生虫与疾病、以及基因组学。整体来看，本周研究体现了从基础生物学到应用管理，并高度融合**物联网（IoT）、机器学习（ML）和遥感技术**的跨学科趋势，旨在应对气候变化和人类活动对渔业可持续性的挑战。

## 高影响力期刊亮点

本周暂无发表在Nature, Science, PNAS, Nature Climate Change, Nature Ecology & Evolution, Nature Sustainability, Nature Communications, Science Advances等顶级期刊上的渔业相关论文。

## 创新性研究

1. **Quantifying post‐release behaviour of a critically endangered elasmobranch over two capture events using high‐resolution archival tag data** (Journal of Fish Biology)
   该研究的创新之处在于利用高分辨率档案标签，首次量化了极度濒危的软骨鱼类在**多次捕获-释放事件**后的行为变化。这超越了以往仅关注单次释放的研究范式，为评估休闲垂钓对高度定居性濒危物种的累积影响提供了关键数据，对制定更精准的保护管理措施具有重要意义。

2. **Linking species distribution models with population abundance to support adaptive fisheries management** (Ecography)
   本研究创新性地将物种分布模型（SDM）与种群丰度数据直接关联，在亚得里亚海建立了首个基于过程的、盆地尺度的关键鱼类栖息地（EFH）框架。其核心创新在于超越了传统的栖息地适宜性预测，能够量化环境变异如何驱动种群丰度变化，为动态海洋生态系统下的适应性渔业管理提供了可操作的工具。

3. **DOM consumption and demethylation of MeHg as potential drivers of low MeHg in Mediterranean Sea sponges and benthic fish: a modeling perspective** (Biogeosciences)
   该研究通过建模视角，提出了一个新颖的机制来解释地中海海绵和底栖鱼类中甲基汞（MeHg）含量异常低的现象。其创新点在于假设溶解有机质（DOM）的消耗和MeHg的去甲基化过程是主要驱动力，挑战了传统的食物网累积观点，为理解汞元素在海洋底栖生态系统中的生物地球化学循环提供了全新思路。

4. **A frequency domain enhanced lightweight oriented object detector for floating raft aquaculture mapping in high-resolution coastal imagery** (Frontiers in Marine Science)
   本研究针对高分辨率遥感影像中浮筏养殖（FRA）的精准制图难题，提出了一种**频域增强的轻量级定向目标检测器**。其创新在于通过频域分析增强目标-背景对比度，并采用轻量化设计，在保证精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，为大规模、长期的沿海养殖动态监测提供了高效、实用的技术方案。

## 推荐阅读

1. **Quantifying post‐release behaviour of a critically endangered elasmobranch over two capture events using high‐resolution archival tag data** — 首次揭示多次捕获事件对濒危软骨鱼类的行为影响，对保护生物学和休闲渔业管理具有重要启示。
2. **Linking species distribution models with population abundance to support adaptive fisheries management** — 将SDM与种群丰度直接关联，为基于生态系统的适应性渔业管理提供了创新性的方法论框架。
3. **DOM consumption and demethylation of MeHg as potential drivers of low MeHg in Mediterranean Sea sponges and benthic fish: a modeling perspective** — 提出解释底栖生物低甲基汞含量的新机制，深化了对海洋汞循环的理解。
4. **A frequency domain enhanced lightweight oriented object detector for floating raft aquaculture mapping in high-resolution coastal imagery** — 为沿海养殖遥感监测提供了高效、精准的新技术，具有重要的应用推广价值。
5. **Differential impacts of hurricanes on direct and complex life cycle parasites: a 42-year study of riverine fish** — 基于长达42年的数据，揭示了飓风对不同生活史类型寄生虫的差异化影响，为理解极端气候事件对淡水生态系统疾病动态的长期效应提供了独特视角。
